title: Final Halftime Show Announced: Madonna, Shakira, BTS
excerpt: The FIFA 2026 World Cup Final halftime show at MetLife Stadium will feature Madonna, Shakira, and BTS in what organizers call 'the most watched musical event in history.'
content:
## A Star-Studded Spectacle

FIFA and the World Cup organizing committee have confirmed the halftime entertainment for the 2026 World Cup Final on July 19 at MetLife Stadium: a once-in-a-lifetime collaboration between pop icon Madonna, global superstar Shakira, and K-pop phenomenon BTS.

"This is the most ambitious halftime show in World Cup history," said FIFA President Gianni Infantino at the announcement. "Three generations of global music royalty, united for a single performance that will be watched by billions."

## The Lineup

- **Madonna** — Performing a medley of her greatest hits including "Like a Prayer" and "Vogue," with a special World Cup-themed arrangement
- **Shakira** — Returning to the World Cup stage after her historic 2010 and 2014 performances, featuring "Waka Waka" and "Hips Don't Lie"
- **BTS** — The K-pop supergroup will perform a new single created exclusively for the World Cup, alongside fan favorites "Dynamite" and "Butter"

The three acts will collaborate on a finale mashup that organizers promise will be "unforgettable."

## VIP Access to the Show

For Vantage 26 clients holding Presidential Suite or Crypto Whale packages for the Final, the experience extends beyond the match. VIP guests will enjoy:
- Pre-show access to rehearsals in the stadium
- Exclusive post-match reception with hospitality hosts
- Premium sightlines to the halftime performance from luxury suites
- Private bars and gourmet catering throughout

## Production Details

The halftime show will run approximately 25 minutes — the longest in World Cup history — utilizing a 360-degree stage design with cutting-edge holographic technology. Over 500 dancers, acrobats, and special effects artists will join the headliners.

MetLife Stadium's 82,500 seats will be filled to capacity, with Vantage 26's VIP suites offering the ultimate viewing experience.
